query: SELECT `id`, `userId`, `name`, `agentIds`, `frequency`, `enabled`, `lastRunAt`, `nextRunAt`, `retentionCount`, `lastError`, `successCount`, `failureCount`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` FROM `baseline_schedules` WHERE (`baseline_schedules`.`enabled` = true AND `baseline_schedules`.`nextRunAt` <= NOW()) LIMIT 10;
